description: The goods have been unpacked, may not be in the original packaging, or the packaging may be damaged. However, the goods are complete and without any damage The product is complete and only unpacked The UniFi Access G2 Starter Kit is the second generation of the basic set of components to install the UniFi Access access system . The set is compatible with most electric locks, magnetic locks and a whole range of 12V accessories such as motion sensors, buttons and alarms. The installation of the entire ecosystem is very fast, easy and offers simple management of users , visitors, plans and levels or access permissions via UniFi Access Controller.
